shelfmark_ssi: UTO Sinai Arabic NF M 8, SPP No. 370
titles_tesim: Lucianus of Caphargamala, Discovery of the relics of Stephen
contents_tesim: Lucianus of Caphargamala, Discovery of the relics of Stephen
full_text_tesim: Good quality hand, probably Roman, with interspersed uncial letter-forms. The g is z or Arabic 5 shaped with flat head, found in late Roman and some post-Roman cursive scripts. Calligraphic hook to left of headstroke of t and to right of hasta of e, round a, see fol. 13r (Brown)
Lucianus of Caphargamala, Discovery of the relics of Stephen
UTO Sinai Arabic NF M 8, SPP No. 370
